issues.description: Condition should be 'LeaderIsName' not 'HasCardOnBoard'. The effect requires the Leader to be Uta, not just any card named Uta on board.

SearchDeck action is incomplete. Missing filter for {FILM} type cards and exclusion of [New Genesis]. Missing the second action to set up DON!! cards as active. The effect has two distinct actions: search/reveal and DON!! setup.
Only one action present. The card text describes two separate effects: (1) search up to 1 FILM card from top 3, (2) set up to 1 DON!! cards as active. Both should be in the actions array.
Filter uses 'kind':'Any' but should specify type FILM and exclude [New Genesis]. Should be something like {'type':'FILM','excludeName':'New Genesis'} or similar structure.
